channel.title: PR — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on PR (Permian Resources) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED PR (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added PR in Q4 2025 · 8.1% of portfolio. Building Permian Resources.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)
